title: Silicon Valley Bank's 48-Hour Collapse Ripples Into Global Absurdity
subtitle: From banking panic to burrito pricing: How financial contagion reached your lunch

ripples.headline: Regional banks lose $100B in market value as contagion spreads to Credit Suisse
Tech startups scramble for new banking partners, venture funding freezes
Wine country vineyards face cash flow crisis as SVB held 44% of wine industry deposits
Federal regulators tighten oversight on mid-size banks, compliance costs surge
Small business lending drops 23% as community banks hoard cash reserves
Local food trucks struggle with payment processing as fintech partners pull services
San Francisco burrito costs $18 as food truck financing gaps force premium pricing

symphony_arc.opening: A bank's 48-hour death spiral begins with uninsured deposits and rising rates
symphony_arc.development: Contagion spreads through interconnected financial networks and industry clusters
symphony_arc.climax: Regulatory response reshapes lending landscape across all business sizes
symphony_arc.resolution: The butterfly effect reaches your lunch order through cascading economic friction
